rationale: Educ. Code §5.003 governs appeal procedures for final orders under specified education code chapters. It does not address property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict exists.
quote: If an order, decision, or determination is described as final in Chapter 7, 11, 12, 39, or 39A, an interlocutory or intermediate order, decision, report, or determination made or reached before the final order, decision, or determination may be appealed only as specifically authorized by this code or a rule adopted under this code.
_note: No conflict. Rule concerns education code appeal procedures; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amount.
